extraction.one_line_summary: DE GHENT Thomas won stage 1 from early breakaway by 3+ minutes, holding break for 4h14m30s before peloton contested group sprint.
tactical_patterns: Lotto Soudal exploited hard terrain profile to allow de Ghent solo breakaway victory with massive 3-minute gap over peloton.
Late-race crash at 900m caught multiple GC contenders including McCarthy and Froome, fragmenting sprint organization completely.
FROOME Chris lost 13+ minutes still not at finish, suggesting teams not controlling for Sky's leader this edition.

rider_signals.DE GHENT Thomas: positive: won fourth Catalunya stage career from solo break, demonstrating exceptional ability to succeed when terrain is selective
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: won peloton sprint despite crash chaos ahead, signaling return to form after presumed poor period
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: crashed day 1, lost massive time (13+ minutes), already battered from previous stage, Sky showing no race control
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: contested sprint finish but couldn't beat Matthews, positioned well but lacked final punch
